diff: Accounts must require a quorum of at least 3 signers for Critical Actions. It must not be possible for quorum to be met with signers from a single entity (no single entity will have enough signers to meet the quorum alone, and each critical action will therefore require approval from signers from at least 2 independent entities).
Signers may be sourced from any of the following entities: Spark Asset Foundation (including legal council), Phoenix Labs, Spark Operational Facilitator.
description:
Originating forum post: https://forum.sky.money/t/saep-07-spark-prime-brokerage/27486

**Do not merge unless associated poll passes**
